basics.name: nodeName
basics.label: Node name
basics.toolTip: The name of the new Strato node.

constraints.validationMessage: You must provide a name for this virtual machine.

basics.name: contactEmail
basics.label: Contact email
basics.toolTip: An email at which you can receive support from BlockApps and which identifies you as a customer for upgrading.

basics.name: adminUsername
basics.label: Username
basics.toolTip: Admin and SSH username for the virtual machine.

basics.name: adminPassword
basics.toolTip: Admin and SSH password for the virtual machine.

constraints.validationMessage: You must provide a password for this virtual machine.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: Virtual machine size
elements.toolTip: Size of the virtual machine to provision.
